name: Suede Skills MCP
summary: Local MCP access to the Suede skill pack: full-stack design and writing modes, Suedify site restyling, Suede SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, AI eval design, one-pass code review+grade, any-repo CI ship-gate, agent-team orchestration, install and launch packaging, MCP QA, artist campaign tools, and creator rights utilities.

publicLinks.label: GitHub Pages site
publicLinks.description: Public landing page for Suede Creator Skills, install paths, docs, and stampable linkset.

publicLinks.label: Ambassador explainer
publicLinks.description: Long-form Markdown guide for ambassadors explaining Suedify, public skills, MCP, SEO/AEO/AI EO audits, QA, social posts, emails, FAQ, and claim boundaries.

publicLinks.label: Copy bank
publicLinks.description: Public copy bank for GitHub, docs, CTA, SEO/AEO/AI EO, FAQ, social, and safety copy.

publicLinks.label: Public installs and MCP
publicLinks.description: Public GitHub skill install commands and Suede Skills MCP guidance.

publicLinks.label: Develop with Suede
publicLinks.description: CTA for people who want Suede to turn a site, campaign, app surface, or design system into a more polished public workflow.

plugins.name: suede-workflow-skills
plugins.description: Public Suede workflow umbrella: full-stack design and writing modes, Suedify restyling, Suede SEO/AEO/AI EO, visibility grading, AI eval design, site alchemy, one-pass code review+grade, any-repo CI ship-gate, MCP QA, launch + install packaging, artist campaigns, and creator rights utilities.

plugins.name: suede-creator-skills
plugins.description: Public artist and creator skills: a full artist campaign builder, neutral sync review packaging, release linting, rights passports, and a rights-readiness audit with provenance, licensing, and royalty-routing lanes.
plugins.publicInstall: python3 ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/scripts/install-skill-from-github.py --repo JasonColapietro/suede-creator-skills --path skills/suede-campaign-in-a-box skills/suede-sync-packaging skills/suede-release-linter skills/suede-rights-passport skills/suede-rights-audit

skills.name: suede-workflow-skills
skills.description: Loads the full Suede workflow in one install — design, copywriting, Suede SEO/AEO/AI EO, Suedify restyling, one-pass code review+grade, CI ship-gate, agent-team orchestration, visual QA, launch and install packaging, artist campaigns, and rights utilities — with progressive feedback and quality gates.
skills.useWhen: Use when a user wants the full Suede workflow pack loaded from one public GitHub skill path with no-missed quality gates.

skills.name: johnny-suede-design
skills.description: Design and write high-polish creative surfaces for Suede or a supplied company — landing pages, brand pages, product UI, dashboards, components, campaigns, and creative projects — through design laws, tokens, motion, visual QA, Suedify reference-site restyling, copywriting, anti-slop scoring, and optional multi-agent coordination. Writing mode is on by default.
skills.useWhen: Use to design, redesign, restyle, suedify, adapt a site's look, build UI, create product screenshots, write or rewrite copy and headlines and CTAs, build a design system, run visual QA, or coordinate a big multi-lane creative build.

skills.name: johnny-suede-write
skills.description: Write anything Suede ships — long-form, short-form, GitHub docs, social, email, product listing copy, ambassador talk-tracks — through mode-specific structure, persuasion frameworks, A/B variants, brand-voice alignment, an anti-slop gate, and a copy score. Default voice Suede; a supplied company brief overrides everything.
skills.useWhen: Use to write, rewrite, package, explain, promote, audit, or polish public copy with the whole writing stack loaded from one mode.

skills.name: suede-code
skills.description: Review and grade code in one pass — deep findings plus a blunt A-F ship verdict by default, with TypeScript, React, Next.js, OWASP, and database checklists, three depth levels, 10+ instant-F triggers, grade caps for auth and payment surfaces, a deploy-safety gate, and fix briefs. Prompted-only; never auto-fires.
skills.useWhen: Use when explicitly asked to review, grade, audit, security-check, or ship-gate a diff, PR, file, or release.

skills.name: suede-code-review
skills.description: Deep-dive any diff with TypeScript, React, Next.js, Swift/mobile, OWASP, and database checklists — run the repo's own gates, honor project rules, trace whole-repo and git history, then return findings, fix briefs, and a signed grade across three depth levels.
skills.useWhen: Use when explicitly asked to review, deep-dive, or security-check a diff, PR, file, or release and you want full findings, not just a grade.

skills.name: suede-code-grader
skills.description: Get a blunt A-F ship verdict on any code change — 7 evidence-backed lanes, 10+ instant-F triggers, grade caps for auth and payment surfaces, and a worked example for every grade level.
skills.useWhen: Use when you need a direct ship/no-ship grade with evidence, not a full line-by-line review.

skills.name: suede-copy
skills.description: Write copy that earns the click — 12 headline formulas, 5 persuasion frameworks, A/B variant generation, a word-substitution list, email and social templates, an anti-slop gate, and a copy score before anything ships.
skills.useWhen: Use to write or rewrite headlines, CTAs, landing, email, or social copy with a conversion and anti-slop pass.

skills.name: suede-design
skills.description: Evolve any Suede interface from generic to intentional — design laws, component-specific rules, dark-mode tokens, fluid typography, animation sequencing, and visual QA for every surface from landing page to app shell.
skills.useWhen: Use to polish UI, set up design tokens, fix visual hierarchy, or run a focused design pass on a single surface.

skills.name: suede-agent-teams
skills.description: Wire complex changes into coordinated agent lanes with quality gates and a signed handoff — WIP collision detection, RFC mode, feature-flag strategy, rollback trees, 5 scenario templates, and a handoff checklist that won't close without evidence.
skills.useWhen: Use when a change is big enough to split across multiple agents or lanes and you need collision-safe coordination and a verified handoff.

skills.name: suede-ai-eval
skills.description: Design AI evaluation strategy, failure-mode rubrics, AI-SPEC artifacts, prompt and retrieval test cases, acceptance gates, and retroactive eval coverage audits for AI-powered product surfaces.
skills.useWhen: Use when a feature uses an LLM, classifier, recommender, agent workflow, RAG/search, media generation, or other AI behavior that needs measurable quality, safety, and regression checks.

skills.name: suede-ship-gate
skills.description: Wire any repo so CI actually gates the merge — path-aware builds, one required check that can't deadlock, lockfile hygiene, runtime pinning from the repo, and the exact branch-protection settings. Detects the stack, package managers, lockfiles, existing workflows, and deploy platform in any folder.
skills.useWhen: Use when adding CI, protecting main, fixing a duplicate or hanging pipeline, or auditing why a required check never passes.

skills.name: suede-seo-audit
skills.description: Suede SEO, AEO, AI EO, metadata, schema, internal-link, crawlability, search-intent, answer-intent, and public docs audit workflow. Website-specific; run on demand.
skills.useWhen: Use when auditing Suede pages, GitHub Pages sites, README files, skill docs, launch pages, copy banks, install pages, sitemap entries, AI result surfaces, or public surfaces.

skills.name: suede-visibility-grader
skills.description: Suede website visibility and CTA grading workflow for public pages, GitHub Pages sites, launch pages, docs, and campaign pages with A-F grades, evidence, grade caps, and rendered design-signal checks. Website-specific; run on demand.
skills.useWhen: Use when a user wants to know whether a page can be found, understood, trusted, cited by AI systems, acted on, and promoted with visual confidence.

skills.name: suede-site-alchemy
skills.description: Suede website conversion and CRO workflow — funnel analysis, friction audit, conversion math, A/B hypotheses, social-proof architecture, pricing psychology, mobile CRO, and a quick-wins list ranked by lift. Website-specific; run on demand.
skills.useWhen: Use for improving page conversion, packaging website growth offers, or routing conversion requests into the full design workflow.

skills.name: suede-launch-packaging
skills.description: Ship Suede work as a launch, not a loose drop — GitHub Pages updates, README and docs launches, skill-pack releases, social and email copy, proof links, install commands, QA, and handoff notes — plus public-first install support that fixes failing Codex and Claude installs, GitHub repo-and-path and raw-URL commands, MCP setup, and marketplace confusion while keeping @personal out of public docs.
skills.useWhen: Use when a skill, repo, site, MCP server, feature, or docs update is ready to share, when an install fails, or when a public user cannot add a skill.

skills.name: suede-mcp-qa
skills.description: Catch a broken Suede Skills MCP before it ships — one that lists missing skills or returns malformed output. Checks source, catalog, every skill folder, tools, resources, prompts, install options, SEO/AEO/AI EO audit scaffolds, QA checklists, JSON-RPC errors, public-safe content, and docs alignment.
skills.useWhen: Use when building, changing, testing, or explaining the Suede Skills MCP.

skills.name: suede-campaign-in-a-box
skills.description: Full-stack artist campaign skill — turn a song, release, era, or catalog moment into a complete rollout, with modes for artist identity, era systems, single-song universes, 5-15s hooks, release stunts, repeatable fan rituals, visualizer and lyric-video treatments, merch and collector objects, live setlist design, catalog revival, and collaborator matchmaking. No fake hype or clearance/placement promises.
skills.useWhen: Use when a musician wants the whole artist world and rollout turned into usable moves.

skills.name: suede-sync-packaging
skills.description: Prepare tracks for sync-style review with scene-fit angles, one-sheet copy, clean and instrumental asset needs, lyric flags, mood tags, rights gaps, and safe pitch copy.
skills.useWhen: Use when a song or catalog asset should be organized for film, TV, ads, games, trailers, creator campaigns, or brand briefs without claiming clearance.

skills.name: suede-release-linter
skills.description: Audit music, audio, video, artwork, and creative release folders for metadata, rights, split, file, and Suede intake gaps.
skills.useWhen: Use before release, licensing, registry preparation, royalty routing, agent commerce, or Suede transfer.

skills.name: suede-rights-passport
skills.description: Prepare creator folders for Suede intake with provenance, rights, credits, splits, licenses, media optimization notes, and missing-info reports.
skills.useWhen: Use when packaging a project into a Suede-ready transfer package.

skills.name: suede-rights-audit
skills.description: Find and organize rights gaps before a creator project is packaged — covers provenance and origin trail, ownership/contributors/credits/splits/samples gap audit, licensing-discussion readiness without claiming clearance, and royalty-routing readiness that moves no money. Organizes evidence only; never clears rights, confirms ownership, approves payouts, or writes to a registry.
skills.useWhen: Use before rights passporting, provenance mapping, licensing prep, registry readiness, royalty routing, or Suede creator intake.
